# `web_currentUrl`

Returns the current page's URL as a plain string. Useful for asserting where a navigation
ended up after redirects (e.g. detecting a bounce to `/login` when replaying an expired
session).

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.playwright.tools.PlaywrightNativeCurrentUrlTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

_(no parameters)_

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)
